ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tours" (
  "tour_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tour */,
  "tour_name" TEXT /* Name of the tour */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tour */,
  "high_cost" REAL /* Cost classified as High Cost */,
  "higher_cost" REAL /* Cost classified as Higher Cost */,
  "highest_cost" REAL /* Cost classified as Highest Cost */,
  "low_cost" REAL /* Cost classified as Low Cost */,
  "lower_cost" REAL /* Cost classified as Lower Cost */,
  "normal_cost" REAL /* Cost classified as Normal Cost */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the tour */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the tour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing category (e.g., High Cost, Normal Cost) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pricing category */,
  "min_cost" REAL /* Minimum cost for the pricing category */,
  "max_cost" REAL /* Maximum cost for the pricing category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tour_pricing" (
  "tour_pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tour pricing record */,
  "tour_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated tour ID */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pricing category ID */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the tour for the specified pricing category */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the pricing becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the pricing expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tour_pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tour_pricing_tour_id FOREIGN KEY ("tour_id") REFERENCES tours ("tour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tour_pricing_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES pricing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tour_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "tour_id" TEXT /* Reference to the associated tour ID */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the tour determined from bookings */,
  "cost_variance" REAL /* Variance in cost based on historical data */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings for the tour */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the tour */,
  "profit" REAL /* Total profit generated by the tour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tour_analysis_tour_id FOREIGN KEY ("tour_id") REFERENCES tours ("tour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the booking */,
  "tour_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tour being booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount paid for the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_tour_id FOREIGN KEY ("tour_id") REFERENCES tours ("tour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "tour_id" TEXT /* Reference to the tour being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was made */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_tour_id FOREIGN KEY ("tour_id") REFERENCES tours ("tour_id")
)
